Expertise

Large Language Models & Agentic AI

  • LLM fine-tuning and prompt engineering
  • Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures
  • Agentic systems and orchestration
  • LangChain, LangGraph, multi-agent workflows
  • Hybrid LLM + classical model systems

Classical & Statistical ML

  • Supervised learning (regression, classification)
  • Ensemble methods and hyperparameter optimization
  • Feature engineering and data preprocessing
  • scikit-learn, XGBoost, and statistical modeling

Model Optimization & Deployment

  • Model quantization and compression for edge deployment
  • Inference optimization and latency reduction
  • Real-time and batch prediction pipelines
  • A/B testing and model monitoring
